content:
Welcome to DevOps Duel, a new series where I compare popular DevOps tools and technologies through practical examples instead of marketing claims.

No hype.

No "X is dead."

Just when to use what, why it exists, and the trade-offs that actually matter.

Upcoming duels include:

• Docker Compose vs Kubernetes

• GitHub Actions vs Jenkins

• Nginx vs Traefik

• Terraform vs OpenTofu

• PostgreSQL vs MongoDB

• Prometheus vs Grafana

The first duel is already live:

Docker Compose vs Kubernetes

Read here:

Click to Read

Feedback, corrections, and discussions are always welcome.
